Who are we?

MAK Holding Group
Investment | Development

Algdyan General Trading WLL, MAK Trading, MAKGold, MAKSteel, MAK-UNIVERSAL Motors, MAK Project Developer.

1
Our Philosophy

Our philosophy is to connect and expand our existence beyond the horizon with strong fortitude to reach any objective.

2
Our Vision

Our Vision is to deliver the best of services in the industry and building a brand in every classification.

3
Our Goal

Our goal is to extend support by delivering state of quality work for any development within the community.
